trap: 5e-2014-vs-5.5: Rangers have 2 prepared spells at level 1 in D&D 2024. In 5e 2014 they had none. Models trained on 2014 data will not flag the missing spells.
prompt:
Audit this D&D 2024 (5.5) level-1 character sheet. Report every rules error with a correction. If the sheet is fully correct, report no findings.

SHEET:
{
  "class": "ranger",
  "species": "elf (wood)",
  "background": "soldier",
  "abilityScores": { "str": 10, "dex": 15, "con": 13, "int": 8, "wis": 14, "cha": 12 },
  "proficiencyBonus": 2,
  "armorClass": 14,
  "hitPoints": 11,
  "passivePerception": 14,
  "savingThrowProficiencies": ["str", "dex"],
  "skillProficiencies": ["athletics", "stealth", "animal-handling", "intimidation", "perception", "survival"],
  "spellcastingAbility": "wis",
  "spellSaveDC": 12,
  "spellAttackBonus": 4,
  "cantrips": ["druidcraft"],
  "preparedSpells": []
}
